prompt:

Asset type: Windows desktop app screen
Primary request: Start/Dashboard screen for Lumbago Music AI in neon glass style
Scene/background: dark gradient background with subtle glow
Subject: dashboard cards with quick actions, recent activity panel, left navigation, top search bar, bottom player dock
Style/medium: high-fidelity UI mockup, glassmorphism, subtle neon edges
Composition/framing: wide 16:10, centered content, roomy spacing
Lighting/mood: soft cyan/magenta glow, premium, restrained
Color palette: #0B0F14, #121826, cyan #6FE7FF, magenta #FF5CD6
Text (verbatim): "Lumbago Music AI", "Start", "Biblioteka", "Import", "Duplikaty", "Ustawienia"
Constraints: Polish labels, minimal legible text, no logos, no watermark
Avoid: clutter, harsh bloom, oversaturated neon
